description:
You are acting as a localization engineer who has just been asked to finish configuring a tiny user-space “translation-sync” service.  
    Complete the setup so the service can discover its configuration file the next time it starts.

    What you must do
    1. Make sure the directory “/home/user/.config/translation-sync/” exists.  
    2. Inside that directory create a plain-text file named “service.conf” whose **exact** contents are:

        [general]
        source_locale = en_US
        target_locales = fr_FR,de_DE,it_IT
        update_interval = 3600

        [logging]
        log_file = /home/user/.local/share/translation-sync/sync.log
        log_level = INFO

       Notes about the required format that the automatic grader will check:
       • There must be NO leading spaces on any line.  
       • Lines are separated by a single UNIX newline character ( \n ).  
       • After the last line (`log_level = INFO`) there must be **exactly one** trailing newline.  
       • The file must not contain any extra blank lines before, after, or in between the blocks other than those shown above.  

    3. Make sure the directory “/home/user/.local/share/translation-sync/” exists.  
       Inside that directory create a file called “prerequisites.log” that contains exactly one line:
       
        config_created: OK

       …followed by **one** trailing newline and nothing else.  

    4. After creating everything, display the contents of “/home/user/.config/translation-sync/service.conf” to STDOUT so the grader can see it on screen as well.

    A correct solution normally takes three or four shell commands (e.g. mkdir, echo or cat >, etc.).  
    You do **not** need root privileges; everything lives in your own home folder.  
    No additional tools or packages are required.  
    When finished, both files must exist with the precise contents listed above, and the final `cat` (or equivalent) to STDOUT must reproduce the exact text of “service.conf”.
truth:
EXPECTED_DIRECTORIES:
      - /home/user/.config/translation-sync/
      - /home/user/.local/share/translation-sync/

    EXPECTED_FILE:/home/user/.config/translation-sync/service.conf
    CONTENT:
[general]
source_locale = en_US
target_locales = fr_FR,de_DE,it_IT
update_interval = 3600

[logging]
log_file = /home/user/.local/share/translation-sync/sync.log
log_level = INFO
<EOF>

    EXPECTED_FILE:/home/user/.local/share/translation-sync/prerequisites.log
    CONTENT:
config_created: OK
<EOF>
